title: FairySouls
description: A fun plugin that recreate the well-known hypixel fairy souls
body:
## Fairy Souls

Fairy Souls is a recreation of a Hypixel Skyblock mechanic, where players must find all the hidden Fairy Souls to receive configurable rewards.

### Features
- Database storage

- Customizable Fairy Soul names

- Works regardless of the block where a Fairy Soul is placed

- Configurable messages

- Reset command

- Configurable rewards (via command execution)

- Configuration reload (without restarting)

- Progress bar to track completion

- Internal placeholders for stats in messages


**__NOTE : THIS PLUGIN DON'T PROTECT THE SOULS, FOR THIS FEATURE, USE A PLUGIN LIKE WORLDGUARD !__**

### Commands

**✅ Available to all players**

/fairy – Displays your progress

**🔒 Requires the fairy.use permission**
/fairy give – Gives you a placeable Fairy Soul

/fairy set – Places a Fairy Soul at your current location (regardless of the block)

/fairy remove – Removes a Fairy Soul at your current location

/fairy reload – Reloads the plugin configuration

/fairy reset – Resets the entire database (confirmation required)

**Spigot link :** 
[https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/fairy-souls-1-0.123739/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/fairy-souls-1-0.123739/)
